ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model type */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal of the experiment (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_type_id") REFERENCES model_types ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameter_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing the hyperparameter details */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameter_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of evaluation metrics */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter configuration the metrics belong to */,
  "mean_fit_time" REAL /* Mean fit time of the model */,
  "std_fit_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of fit time of the model */,
  "mean_score_time" REAL /* Mean score time of the model */,
  "std_score_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of score time of the model */,
  "mean_test_score" REAL /* Mean test score of the model */,
  "std_test_score" REAL /* Standard deviation of test score of the model */,
  "rank_test_score" INTEGER /* Rank of the test score (lower is better) */,
  "mean_train_score" REAL /* Mean train score of the model */,
  "std_train_score" REAL /* Standard deviation of train score of the model */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES hyperparameter_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cross_validation_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross-validation split */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter configuration the split belongs to */,
  "split_number" INTEGER /* Number of the split in the cross-validation (e.g., 0, 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "test_score" REAL /* Test score of the model in the split */,
  "train_score" REAL /* Train score of the model in the split */,
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fold in the cross-validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cross_validation_splits_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES hyperparameter_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cross_validation_splits_fold_id FOREIGN KEY ("fold_id") REFERENCES folds ("fold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type (e.g., Neural Network, Gaussian Mixture Model) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the model type (e.g., neural networks, probabilistic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Message describing the status */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_status_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the log belongs to */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folds" (
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fold */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the fold belongs to */,
  "fold_number" INTEGER /* Number of the fold in the cross-validation (e.g., 0, 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "test_size" INTEGER /* Size of the test set in the fold */,
  "train_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training set in the fold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folds_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the experiment (e.g., neural networks, classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "tag")
)
